target: Saint Ambrose of Optina / Optina Pustyn old images

source_leads.label: Wikimedia Commons - Category: Ambrose of Optina
source_leads.why_use: Confirmed category with seven Ambrose media files including portraits/photos such as Ambrosius of Optina.jpg, Amvrosiy Optinskiy.jpg, Photo Amvrosiy Optinskiy.jpg, and Russischer Photograph - Vater Ambrosij.
source_leads.license_action: Open each file page and record exact license before public use.
source_leads.production_use: Portrait/icon rotation for Ambrose scenes; avoid overusing one image.

source_leads.label: Wikimedia Commons - Category: Optina Pustyn
source_leads.why_use: Likely best source for monastery exteriors, interiors, church buildings, and pilgrimage location visuals.
source_leads.license_action: Open each file page and record license/author/source.
source_leads.production_use: Location anchors for opening, travel-to-Optina, legacy, and closing scenes.

source_leads.label: GetArchive/PICRYL - pre-revolutionary Optina photograph lead
source_leads.why_use: Search result describes a public-domain pre-revolutionary photograph of Vladimir Church and cathedral at Optina Pustyn.
source_leads.license_action: Page fetch may be blocked; verify public-domain status and download original manually or from source collection.
source_leads.production_use: High-value old monastery image if license/source checks pass.

source_leads.label: Neskuchny Sad gallery lead - 200 years of Saint Ambrose
source_leads.why_use: Search result states Ambrose was one of the first saints captured in photographs and includes portraits/places connected to him.
source_leads.license_action: Treat as research/reference only unless explicit image reuse rights are shown.
source_leads.production_use: Use to identify image types and historical context; do not copy modern site images without rights.

source_leads.label: Hoover Institution Archives photo research guide lead
source_leads.why_use: Search result mentions an Optina Pustyn elders icon print in Hoover photo archive guide.
source_leads.license_action: Contact/archive lookup likely needed; not an immediate free-use source.
source_leads.production_use: Future premium/archive research lead for elder-group icon imagery.

next_actions: Retry Wikimedia downloads after 429 rate-limit clears.
For each downloaded image, write asset_attribution.json with title, URL, author, license, and date accessed.
Prefer verified Wikimedia/Commons files first; use other Russian gallery pages only as visual reference unless reuse rights are explicit.
